globalRules: This is the 420 System frontend - a multi-tenant AI business automation platform by Zate Systems
Use React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI
All Supabase queries MUST filter by tenant_id
Supabase anon key requires RLS policies - queries may return zero rows without them
Tenant ID format: some tables use SLUG (zateceptionist), others use UUID - always check
Do NOT use localStorage or sessionStorage - use React state instead
